expectations.text: Response creates navbar component with sticky positioning
expectations.evidence: Creates src/components/layout/navbar.tsx with className 'sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b bg-background/95 backdrop-blur'. Explicitly notes 'Sticky positioning with sticky top-0 z-50 -- this keeps the header pinned to the top on scroll.'
Creates src/components/layout/footer.tsx with copyright, privacy, and terms links. Uses responsive layout with flex-col on mobile and sm:flex-row on larger screens.

expectations.text: Response modifies __root.tsx to wrap Outlet with layout
expectations.evidence: Shows app/routes/__root.tsx with createRootRoute importing Navbar and Footer, wrapping <Outlet /> between them. Explains 'TanStack Router renders every route as a child of __root.tsx via the <Outlet /> slot.'

expectations.text: Response uses semantic HTML (header, nav, main, footer)
expectations.evidence: Navbar uses <header> and <nav> elements, content area uses <main>, footer uses <footer>. Verification checklist explicitly lists 'Semantic elements used: <header>, <nav>, <main>, <footer>'.

expectations.text: Response uses min-h-dvh flex flex-col pattern
expectations.evidence: Root layout uses className 'flex min-h-dvh flex-col' on the outer div. Includes explanation: 'Why min-h-dvh instead of min-h-screen: The dvh (dynamic viewport height) unit accounts for mobile browser chrome like the address bar and toolbar.'
